summary: Excellent, crystal‑clear recording of a solid show highlighted by a standout "Looks Like Rain" and a debated "Good Lovin'" performance.
review: Listeners rave about the razor‑sharp sound quality – calling it the “toastiest” and “crispiest” copy of the 11‑05 concert – while the musical content is generally well received. Highlights include an enthusiastic "Looks Like Rain" and a polarizing rendition of "Good Lovin'", with most fans praising the performance despite one reviewer preferring other Pigpen versions.

ai_rating.rationale: The majority of reviews praise the recording’s clarity and overall show quality, but contradictory opinions on "Good Lovin'" and a single low‑star rating lower the average.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Multiple reviewers describe the sound as crisp, toasted, and great on their home systems; no major dropouts mentioned, though one notes occasional difficulty hearing vocals at the end of "Looks Like Rain".

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; reviewers focus mainly on individual song performance and overall sound quality.

band_member_comments.Bob: Bob’s vocal at the end of "Looks Like Rain" is hard to hear for some listeners, but his passion is noted.
